1.name: Creating
1.overall image:
Heaven moves inexhaustibly
The noble young one, accordingly, is naturally energetic, without rest
1.image description:
The universe is energetic and creative
When you team up with the universe
You have aligned with your natural creativity and energy
1.judgement description: Your actions determine your satisfaction. They are the ground upon which you stand. You are what you do. Your self is merely a temporary intersection of choices. Even the divine is developmental. Evolution reaches for the possible. Fulfillment and meaning arise through persistent action.

1st.text: Lurking dragon - not at all useful
1st.advice: Your potential is hidden. You are not yet ready to act. This isn't indecision, it is the wrong place and time. Wait for the right moment. Prepare yourself.

2nd.text:
Dragon appears in the field
Rewarding to encounter a mature human being
2nd.advice: The situation is ready for action but will benefit from cooperation with someone more experienced. Or an energy that is more mature and developed. You are on the right track but you will benefit from guidance and support.

3rd.text:
A noble young one, throughout the day, creating, creating
By nightfall looking frightful
A struggle
Not an error
3rd.advice: The situation is building and you are on the right track but you will be tested. Seek consensus but do not compromise. Tread lightly, carry a big stick. Turning and returning is the way.

4th.text:
Somehow to dance across the deep
With no mistakes
4th.advice: A moment of uncertainty at a crossroads in your creation. You are ready to proceed but take a breath and do so wit caution and renewed intention. Small steps, gentle persuasion.

5th.text:
Dragon in flight across the sky
Rewarding to encounter a mature human being
5th.advice: Your success is assured. Make full use of your resources and contacts. You have risen to this position as the result of your sync with the universe. This power is greater than you, use it wisely, generously, humbly but use it.

6th.text: Arrogant dragon will have regrets
6th.little image: Excessiveness is not suited to longevity.
6th.advice: You have lost touch with reality. Your ambition has clouded your humanity and judgment. Remember, insecurity and doubt are the other side of selfishness and overconfidence. This position suggests the end of the project so it is your last chance

all.text:
Observe a group of dragons - without a leader
Promising
all.little image: Heaven's nature is not about playing the leader.
all.advice: The universe is not about control but about harmony. Every aspect of the situation is changing. This position is a perfect balance of creative and receptive.

2nd.text:
Passing by one's ancestor
To meet with one's grandmother
Wanting to reach one's superior
But meeting another underling
Not wrong

3rd.text:
One is never beyond defending oneself
From behind someone might attack here
Unlucky

4th.text:
Make no mistakes
Do not be beyond greeting others in passing
Difficult progress demands heedfulness
Do not rely on unrelenting persistence

5th.text:
Thick clouds but no rain
From our western horizon
Even the prince hunts with tethered arrows
Preferring that quarry inside the cave

6th.text:
With no acknowledgement in passing others by The flying birds get distance from this one
Bad omen
Surely a sign of calamity and suffering

63.name: Already Complete
63.overall image:
Water positioned over the flame
Already complete
The noble young one, accordingly, contemplates sorrows and so prepares to maintain against them
63.judgement:
Complete
Fulfillment is minor
But rewarding to persist
At the beginning, promise; by the end, disorder

1st.text:
Braking those wheels
Soaking one's tail
No harm done

2nd.text:
The matron loses her carriage's veil
To not pursue this
Means seven days to gain

3rd.text:
The illustrious ancestor subjugated barbarian country
It took three years to conquer them
Lesser people were not at all useful

4th.text:
The silk jacket will wear into caulking rags
Throughout the day be on guard

5th.text:
The eastern neighbor sacrifices cattle
Yet this is not equal to the western neighbor's modest spring offering
The genuine received their blessings

6th.text:
Soaking one's head
Serious

64.name: Not Yet Complete
64.overall image:
The flame is positioned on top of the water
Not yet complete
The noble young one, accordingly, is heedful and discerning so that things remain straightforward
64.judgement:
Yet Complete
Fulfillment
The little fox is almost across the half-frozen stream
To soak that tail
Is not a direction with merit

1st.text:
Soaking one's tail
Embarrassing

2nd.text:
Braking those wheels
Persistence is promising

3rd.text:
If not yet across, to go boldly has pitfalls
It is worthwhile to cross the great stream

4th.text:
Persistence is promising while regrets pass
Force was spent to subjugate the barbarian country
Though three years brought rewards of great domains

5th.text:
Persistence is promising
Despite the regrets
The noble young one moves toward the light of example
Holding true
Promising

6th.text:
Being confident on top of drinking wine
Not wrong
But to soak one's own head,
Even with truth, is truly to lose it
